overview: A bold single-page website for Prithvi Infrastructure, a construction company, featuring smooth-scroll navigation, project gallery lightbox, and contact form.
features: Fixed black header with PI logo and red navigation links with smooth-scroll
Hero section with massive bold title and GST number
About section with company story and director bio
Services section with 3 white cards on dark background
Why Choose Us with cyan headings and photo columns
4-column project gallery with lightbox detail view
Contact form via Get in Touch button
Red footer with company name and contact info
